title: Crafthub III
description: A kitchen sink/exploration modpack originally for a private server!
body:
# Crafthub III (3)

This modpack originally was made for use in a private server, but is now public.

It's mainly a kitchen sink pack but is somewhat focused on exploration, with some optimization and tech mods sprinkled in.

**Additional Note:** The pack has v2 in it's file name due to it being the 2nd revision of the pack, and since this is the first pack alivable elsewhere and not only the git repo, thus it's project name doesn't include the v2 marker.\*\*

\*\* This is has changed since `3.0.0+1.20.1-rc.1`, the file name no longer includes it.

## Requirements

|     |     Minimum     | Recommended     |
|:---:|:---------------:|-----------------|
| RAM | 4 GB (4096 MiB) | 6 GB (6144 MiB) |

## Support

**Only support provided is issues in the git repo.**

### 1.20.1

**This version of the pack is under development and has multiple missing mods! Do not update unless you know what are you doing!**

#### Major Mod Changes

```diff
- You're in Grave Danger (Awaiting for update)
- slotlink
+ Applied Energistics 2
```

## Included Shaders, Texture Packs

- [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
